message.content:
@startuml
!theme base

package "db" {
  class ConnectionDB <<interface>> {
    +connection : Connection
    +getinstance() : ConnectionDBMySQL
    +getDB() : Connection
  }
  
  class ConnectionDBMySQL {
    -connection : Connection
    +getinstance() : ConnectionDBMySQL
    +getDB() : Connection
  }
  
  class LazyHolderDB {
    -final INSTANCE : ConnectionDBMySQL
  }
  
  LazyHolderDB ..> ConnectionDB : implements
  ConnectionDBMySQL ..> ConnectionDB : implements
}

package "gui" {
  class OfferController {
    -FAQ : ListView
    -answerQuestion : JButtonBar
    -update : JButtonBar
    -update : JButtonBar
    -newQuestion : JButtonBar
    -rateArea : JButtonBar
    +handleNewQuestionActionEvent : ActionEvent -> void
    +handleUpdateQuestionActionEvent : ActionEvent -> void
    +handleUpdateAnswerQuestionActionEvent : ActionEvent -> void
    +handleDeleteQuestionActionEvent : ActionEvent -> void
    +handleDeleteAnswerQuestionActionEvent : ActionEvent -> void
    +handleUpdateScoreQuestionActionEvent : ActionEvent -> void
    +handleUpdateScoreAnswerQuestionEvent : ActionEvent -> void
  }
  
  class NewQuestionController {
    -questionArea : JTextArea
    -postQuestion : JButtonBar
    -cancel : JButtonBar
    +handleNewQuestionActionEvent : ActionEvent -> void
    +cancellationEvent : ActionEvent -> void
  }
  
  class NewAnswerController {
    -answerArea : JTextArea
    -postAnswer : JButtonBar
    -cancel : JButtonBar
    +handleNewAnswerActionEvent : ActionEvent -> void
    +cancellationEvent : ActionEvent -> void
  }
  
  class LoadView {
    +loadNamesFromXML : Parent -> void
    +changeScreenActionEvent : ActionEvent, view : String -> void
  }
  
  OfferController --> NewQuestionController
  OfferController --> NewAnswerController
  LoadView --> OfferController
}

package "business" {
  class FAQFacade {
    +getQuestionById : int -> Question
    +getAnswerById : int -> Answer
    +createQuestionId : int, userid : int, offerid : int, answerid : int, question : String, score : int -> Question
    +createAnswerId : int, userid : int, answer : String, score : int -> Answer
    +getQuestionsByOfferId : int -> ArrayList<Question>
    +getAnswersByOfferId : int -> ArrayList<Answer>
    +updateQuestionScoreId : int, userid : int, offerid : int, answerid : int, question : String, score : int -> Question
    +updateAnswerScoreId : int, userid : int, answer : String, score : int -> Answer
    +deleteQuestionId : int -> boolean
    +deleteAnswerId : int -> boolean
  }
  
  class SessionFacade {
    +getSession() : User
    +getUserId() : int
  }
  
  class Question {
    -questionid : int
    -content : String
    -score : int
    -answerid : int
    -offerid : int
    +Question()
    +getQuestionid() : int
    +getContent() : String
    +getScore() : int
    +getAnswerid() : int
    +getOfferid() : int
    +setQuestionid : int -> void
    +setContent : String -> void
    +setAnswer : Answer -> void
    +setScore : int -> void
    +setUserId : int -> void
    +setOfferId : int -> void
  }
  
  class Answer {
    -answerid : int
    -content : String
    -score : int
    -userid : int
    +Answer()
    +getAnswerid() : int
    +getContent() : String
    +getScore() : int
    +getUserId() : int
    +setAnswerid : int -> void
    +setContent : String -> void
    +setScore : int -> void
    +setUserId : int -> void
    +setOfferId : int -> void
  }
  
  FAQFacade --> SessionFacade
}

package "dao" {
  class DAO <<interface>> {
    +findId : int -> T
    +create : T -> T
    +update : T -> T
    +delete : T -> boolean
  }
  
  class AnswerDao {
    -getinstance() : QuestionDao
    -LazyHolder
    +getQuestionsByOfferId : int -> ArrayList<Answer>
    +questionExistsId : int -> boolean
    +answerExistsId : int -> boolean
  }
  
  class OfferDao {
    -getinstance() : QuestionDao
    -LazyHolder
    +getQuestionsByOfferId : int -> ArrayList<Question>
    +questionExistsId : int -> boolean
    +hasAnAnswerId : int -> boolean
  }
  
  class QuestionDao {
    -getinstance() : QuestionDao
    -LazyHolder
    +getQuestionsByOfferId : int -> ArrayList<Question>
    +questionExistsId : int -> boolean
    +hasAnAnswerId : int -> boolean
  }
  
  class AbstractFactoryDao {
    -final connectionDB : ConnectionDB
    -content : String
    -userid : int
    +getFactoryType : TypeDB -> AbstractFactoryDao
    +getAnswerDao() : AnswerDao
    +getQuestionDao() : QuestionDao
  }
  
  class AnswerDaoMySQL {
    +final connectionDB : ConnectionDB
  }
  
  class QuestionDaoMySQL {
    +final connectionDB : ConnectionDB
  }
  
  class FactoryDaoMySQL {
  }
  
  AnswerDao ..> DAO : implements
  OfferDao ..> DAO : implements
  QuestionDao ..> DAO : implements
  AnswerDaoMySQL ..> AnswerDao : implements
  QuestionDaoMySQL ..> QuestionDao : implements
  FactoryDaoMySQL ..> AbstractFactoryDao : implements
  AbstractFactoryDao --> AnswerDaoMySQL
  AbstractFactoryDao --> QuestionDaoMySQL
}

@enduml
